title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide on how small habits can create big life changes. Written in simple English, great for beginners.

title: The Psychology of Money
author: Morgan Housel
description: Explains how people think about money and why they make financial decisions. Very easy to read.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: Introduces big science ideas like space, time, and black holes in a way non-scientists can understand.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: Explains how humans evolved and built societies, combining history and science storytelling..

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: Teaches how to write clear, readable, and professional code. A must-read for programmers.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt & David Thomas
description: Focuses on practical skills and mindset to become a better software developer.

title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen
description: A deep and widely used book on algorithms. Powerful but more advanced level.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A simple and inspiring story about following your dreams. Good for improving English reading.
